data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: RED state verified ✓ — bash tests/docs/test-playwright-doc-refs.sh exits 1 with PASSED: 3  FAILED: 3. The 3 passing assertions are no-MCP-refs guards (already passing). The 3 failing RED assertions are: CLAUDE.md/@playwright/cli interface ref, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md/@playwright/cli patterns, INSTALL.md/@playwright/cli setup. run-all.sh pre-existing failures are unrelated to this task (all pre-date this worktree).
